title: neottia bungeana
intro: Neottia bungeana, also known as the Chinese ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid native to East Asia, characterized by its delicate and slender habit, with a cylindrical stem and a series of small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which are believed to help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Neottia bungeana include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and even have a positive impact on the immune system. In traditional Chinese herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or decoction form, and sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
